positive: A whimsical, stylized depiction of a forest creature, blending elements of a fox, deer, and celestial beings. The creature is positioned centrally, facing the viewer, with elegant, flowing lines and sharp, clean edges. It is surrounded by abstract constellations, glowing geometric patterns, and oversized bioluminescent mushrooms. The composition features strong black and white contrast with accents of ethereal sapphire blue and muted gold leaf. Minimalist, clean silhouette style, suitable for repeat printing on fabric. Highly detailed line art combined with modern graphic elements. Flat vector aesthetic, digital illustration, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, watermarks, text, logos, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, poor quality, grainy, photo, 3d render, photorealistic
